# Pawsence - Ambient Screen Companion For Your Pet

Pawsence connects to your existing pet camera and manifests them as an ambient 3D desktop companion.

## Key Features
- [How it Works](https://pawsence.com/#how-it-works)
- [Creator Sandbox](https://pawsence.com/#creator-sandbox)
- [Supported Cameras](https://pawsence.com/#cameras)
- [Ecosystem](https://pawsence.com/#ecosystem)
